stemHtml: A departing VFR flight is being handled by approach control. Upon reaching the boundary of the area over which the approach control has responsibility, the pilot should...

options.a: free-call the en-route frequency requesting an appropriate level of ATC service.
options.b: request a clearance to leave controlled airspace.
options.c: report the intended route of the flight and when he/she will make a position report.
options.d: report that he/she is leaving the area of jurisdiction.
